reviews.comment:
la verdad es que demoran mucho en atender y siempre cierran las islas dejando dos o tres, lo que se forma cola y te hacen perder el tiempo

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that they take a long time to serve and they always close the islands leaving two or three, which creates a queue and makes you waste time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ODhMRVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Somos socios hace mucho, también lo fueron nuestros padres, y utilizamos las dependencias en los viajes. Se caracterizan por la limpieza, cordialidad de sus empleados. Orgullosos de pertenecer a un club que funciona como corresponde en todos los aspectos.

(Translated by Google)
We've been members for a long time, as have our parents, and we've used the facilities on trips. They're known for their cleanliness and friendly staff. We're proud to belong to a club that operates properly in every way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5amNDUVRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien. Faltantes de productos cuando fui. Atención buena

(Translated by Google)
Good. Some products were out of stock when I visited. Service was good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dGUycWFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Habia solo una persona atendiendo y esperaba con la mano en la manguera hasta terminar de cargar un auto. En lugar de que cargue automaticamente de a 2 autos. Y habia por lo menos 3 autos en cada surtido de cola.

(Translated by Google)
There was only one person working, and they were waiting with their hand on the hose until they finished filling one car, instead of automatically filling two cars at a time. And there were at least three cars in each queue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dGVUNmpnRRAB
